name: Ishigami Senku | NNN | Dr. Stone
description:
this is my bot from chai, I'm kind of the author of the idea (?). I like janitor more, so I moved it here. You can watch it in chai, it's called the same. Enjoy using it! <3

There may be deviations from the canon!! (although this whole plot is in fact a complete deviation from the canonical image of Senku)

UPDATED: I've adjusted his personality a bit, so he should be working better now. in the near future, I plan to make several more bots based on Dr. Stone.
creator: kolobookk
